ddls:
CREATE TABLE "protein_sequences" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein sequence */,
  "accession" TEXT /* Accession number of the protein */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species of the protein */,
  "xml_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the XML file containing the protein data */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein sequence */,
  "evalue" REAL /* E-value of the protein sequence */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the protein sequence */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the protein sequence */,
  "structure" INTEGER /* Structural information of the protein */,
  "low_quality" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sequence is of low quality */,
  "precursor" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sequence is a precursor */,
  "predicted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sequence is predicted */,
  "isoform" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sequence is an isoform */,
  "hypothetical" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sequence is hypothetical */,
  "partial" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sequence is partial */,
  "raw_line" TEXT /* Raw data line from the source file */,
  "uid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the protein entry */,
  "keep" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sequence should be kept */,
  "orig_species" TEXT /* Original species name of the protein */,
  "ott_id" TEXT /* Open Tree of Life Taxonomic Identifier (OTT ID) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the curator who last updated the entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sequence is active */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Source database of the sequence */,
  "method_of_identification" TEXT /* Method used to identify the sequence */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Publication status of the sequence */,
  "accession_version" TEXT /* Version number of the accession */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of the sequence */,
  "is_redundant" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sequence is redundant */,
  "is_curated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sequence is curated */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sequence */,
  "experimental_evidence" TEXT /* Experimental evidence for the sequence */,
  "predicted_function" TEXT /* Predicted function of the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_sequences_curator_id FOREIGN KEY ("curator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_sequences_xml_file_path FOREIGN KEY ("xml_file_path") REFERENCES xml_files ("file_path"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_sequences_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "taxonomic_id" TEXT /* Taxonomic identifier of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the species */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "genome_size" REAL /* Size of the genome in base pairs */,
  "is_endangered" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the species is endangered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "xml_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each XML file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the XML file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the XML file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the XML file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., XML, JSON) */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version number of the file */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the file is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data curator, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is an admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein sequence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the protein sequence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the protein sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web) */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES protein_sequences ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein sequence being annotated */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., draft, reviewed) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the annotation */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the annotation is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES protein_sequences ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein sequence */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the sequence */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "version_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES protein_sequences ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_version_author FOREIGN KEY ("version_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein sequence */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "publication_authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "publication_journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "pmid" TEXT /* PMID of the publication */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_publications_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES protein_sequences ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_taxonomy" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the species */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species name */,
  "taxonomic_rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank of the entry */,
  "taxonomic_status" TEXT /* Status of the taxonomic entry (e.g., accepted, synonym) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_taxonomy_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "protein_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first protein sequence */,
  "protein_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second protein sequence */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., binding, activation) */,
  "interaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "interaction_score" REAL /* Score of the interaction */,
  "interaction_evidence" TEXT /* Evidence for the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_interactions_protein_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id_1") REFERENCES protein_sequences ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_interactions_protein_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id_2") REFERENCES protein_sequences ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein sequence */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "function_description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "function_evidence" TEXT /* Evidence for the function */,
  "function_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_functions_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES protein_sequences ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein sequence */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "disease_description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "disease_prevalence" TEXT /* Prevalence of the disease */,
  "disease_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the disease association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_diseases_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES protein_sequences ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein sequence */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "drug_description" TEXT /* Description of the drug */,
  "drug_target_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the drug target */,
  "drug_effect" TEXT /* Effect of the drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_drugs_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES protein_sequences ("protein_id")
)
